MOKOUMOD-BURNING_PLUME.description: Start each combat with [blue]{RekindlePower}[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold] and [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold]. On entering a new [gold]Act[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Essence[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BURNING_PLUME.title: Burning Plume
MOKOUMOD-IMMORTAL_PLUME.description: Start each combat with [blue]{RekindlePower}[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold] and [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold]. On entering a new [gold]Act[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Essence[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-IMMORTAL_PLUME.title: Immortal Plume
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA_OF_IGNITION.description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{BurnPower}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies twice.
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA_OF_IGNITION.flavor: Commonly used for repelling bugs and annoying Tengus.
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA_OF_IGNITION.title: Ofuda of Ignition
MOKOUMOD-LUMP_OF_COAL.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cinders}[/blue] random [gold]Cinder[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-LUMP_OF_COAL.flavor: The further your bullets travel, the further they travel.
MOKOUMOD-LUMP_OF_COAL.title: Lump of Coal
MOKOUMOD-MAPO_TOFU.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP and [blue]{Essence}[/blue] [gold]Essence[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-MAPO_TOFU.flavor: Get that strawberry away from here AAAHHHHH!
MOKOUMOD-MAPO_TOFU.title: Mapo Tofu
MOKOUMOD-GRILL.title: Grill
MOKOUMOD-VENGEFUL_GHOST.description: Whenever you lose HP on your own turn, ALL enemies lose the same amount.
MOKOUMOD-VENGEFUL_GHOST.flavor: One of them escaped from Orin.
MOKOUMOD-VENGEFUL_GHOST.title: Vengeful Ghost
MOKOUMOD-EXTRA_STAGE.description: At the start of turn [blue]{ActiveTurn}[/blue], gain [blue]{RekindlePower}[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-EXTRA_STAGE.title: Extra Stage
MOKOUMOD-PEERLESS_PATRIOTS_ELIXIR.descri: The first time each turn you play an Attack with no [gold]Enchantment[/gold], [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [gold]Vigorous[/gold] before it takes effect.
MOKOUMOD-PEERLESS_PATRIOTS_ELIXIR.flavor: RIP Reisen you will be missed.
MOKOUMOD-PEERLESS_PATRIOTS_ELIXIR.title: Peerless Patriot's Elixir
MOKOUMOD-FIREMAN_HELMET.description: The first [blue]{FireProofPower}[/blue] times you lose HP from [gold]Burn[/gold] each combat, lose only [blue]1[/blue] HP. Your [gold]Burn[/gold] HP loss is [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FIREMAN_HELMET.flavor: The autoignition temperature of paper is approximately 451 degrees Fahrenheit.
MOKOUMOD-FIREMAN_HELMET.title: Fireman Helmet
